eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Ward, ND; at 12:12 PM on MAR 13, 2019 Effective until 12:27 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This a required quarterly test of the Minot operational emergency alert system.  This is only a test.  This ends the test of the Minot operational area emergency alert system.  This was only a test.
